	We urgently need an experienced procurement/marketing executive in our client establishments at GRA and Stadium rd axis of Port Harcourt.


Requirements


	Interested applicants must have at least 5yrs. experience in the procurement/marketing department.
	Interested applicants must be good at multitasking and working with minimal supervision.
	Qualification: BSc/HND in social science or Engineering field.


Salary
N100,000&nbsp;- N200,000 / month based on experience.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and attached passport to:&nbsp;padoserveconsulting@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Procurement / Marketing Executive Job at Padoserve Limited




        
    

        
        Padoserve Limited - Our client, based in Port Harcourt, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement / Marketing Executive

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We urgently need an experienced procurement/marketing executive in our client establishments at GRA and Stadium rd axis of Port Harcourt.


Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Interested applicants must have at least 5yrs. experience in the procurement/marketing department.
	Interested applicants must be good at multitasking and working with minimal supervision.
	Qualification: BSc/HND in social science or Engineering field.


Salary
N100,000 - N200,000 / month based on experience.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and attached passport to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Account Officer",
  "description": "SkyMall is a family-friendly destination for entertainment, leisure, and shopping, situated on the Lekki-Epe Expressway in the Sangotedo axis of Lagos. It is home to various brands and businesses offering top-quality goods and services on a daily basis.&nbsp;Sky Mall is divided into two sections: the main Shopping mall for shopping and recreation, and the Extension section, which offers office spaces. The mall boasts an opulent decor and a wide range of shops, office spaces, warehouses, top-notch restaurants, exclusive VIP lounges, cinemas, and a terrace bar.

We provide easy movements from the ground floor to the top floor of the mall by stationing two elevators and three escalators within the shopping mall. There is also a cargo lift that runs from the ground floor to the third floor at the Extension part of the mall.&nbsp;We provide our tenants with an official parking lot strictly for business operators in the mall, and also we provide a well-secured car park for customers, which can accommodate more than 300 cars.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Iju Ishaga, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	An Account Officer in a Nigerian retail company (supermarket)manages daily financial transactions, including revenue reconciliation (POS, cash), accounts payable/receivable, inventory monitoring, and tax compliance.
	They ensure accurate record-keeping, prevent revenue leakage, and prepare financial reports to support management decision-making.


Key Responsibilities and Duties


	Revenue &amp; Cash Management:&nbsp;Reconcile daily sales from bars, kitchens, and front offices (POS systems and cash reports) to ensure accuracy.
	Financial Record Keeping:&nbsp;Maintain daily financial records and update ledgers, often using accounting software.
	Accounts Payable/Receivable:&nbsp;Manage vendor payments and follow up on overdue customer invoices.
	Inventory Control:&nbsp;Monitor inventory and stock records for purchases and usage in hospitality operations.
	Compliance and Reporting:&nbsp;Ensure timely filing of taxes (VAT, WHT, PAYE) and assist with monthly/annual financial reports.
	Audit &amp; Control:&nbsp;Perform periodic internal audits (cash, stock) to ensure compliance with financial policies.
	Other duties assigned by the superior.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor&#39;s Degree or HND with 2-5 years of experience.
	The candidate must reside around the Iju-Ishaga axis.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 / Month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to:&nbsp;g.nwogwor@bildiamo.com&nbsp;,&nbsp;b.fabiyi@bildiamo.com&nbsp;,&nbsp;admin@bildiamo.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note:&nbsp;The candidate must reside around the Iju-Ishaga axis.",

Account Officer Job at SkyMall




        
    

        
        SkyMall is a family-friendly destination for entertainment, leisure, and shopping, situated on the Lekki-Epe Expressway in the Sangotedo axis of Lagos. It is home to various brands and businesses offering top-quality goods and services on a daily basis. Sky Mall is divided into two sections: the main Shopping mall for shopping and recreation, and the Extension section, which offers office spaces. The mall boasts an opulent decor and a wide range of shops, office spaces, warehouses, top-notch restaurants, exclusive VIP lounges, cinemas, and a terrace bar.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We provide easy movements from the ground floor to the top floor of the mall by stationing two elevators and three escalators within the shopping mall. There is also a cargo lift that runs from the ground floor to the third floor at the Extension part of the mall. We provide our tenants with an official parking lot strictly for business operators in the mall, and also we provide a well-secured car park for customers, which can accommodate more than 300 cars.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Officer

Job Location: Iju Ishaga, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	An Account Officer in a Nigerian retail company (supermarket)manages daily financial transactions, including revenue reconciliation (POS, cash), accounts payable/receivable, inventory monitoring, and tax compliance.
	They ensure accurate record-keeping, prevent revenue leakage, and prepare financial reports to support management decision-making.


Key Responsibilities and Duties


	Revenue & Cash Management: Reconcile daily sales from bars, kitchens, and front offices (POS systems and cash reports) to ensure accuracy.
	Financial Record Keeping: Maintain daily financial records and update ledgers, often using accounting software.
	Accounts Payable/Receivable: Manage vendor payments and follow up on overdue customer invoices.
	Inventory Control: Monitor inventory and stock records for purchases and usage in hospitality operations.
	Compliance and Reporting: Ensure timely filing of taxes (VAT, WHT, PAYE) and assist with monthly/annual financial reports.
	Audit & Control: Perform periodic internal audits (cash, stock) to ensure compliance with financial policies.
	Other duties assigned by the superior.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree or HND with 2-5 years of experience.
	The candidate must reside around the Iju-Ishaga axis.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] , [email protected] , [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: The candidate must reside around the Iju-Ishaga axis.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

title: Social Media Manager Job at Doheney Services Limited
content:
Doheney Services Limited helps businesses work more efficiently and effectively by providing tech, admin, and structured staff, all within the budget provided. The company has been working with businesses in Nigeria, the UK, and some other parts of the world, to help them do better work for less money. Doheney services can take over tedious tasks like hiring new suitable employees, project management, or even creating reward systems.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager

Job Location: Gbagada, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Structure: Hybrid (1 day in-office for content shooting; 4 days remote)
Reports to: CEO
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Role Summary


	This is a hybrid role designed for a self-starter who can work independently from home while coming into our Gbagada studio once a week to capture high-quality content and sync with the team.
	The Social Media Manager is responsible for building our online presence, engaging our community, and creating all brand content.
	You will manage the entire lifecycle of a post from ideation and filming to caption writing and community management.
	Your goal is to grow our following, increase engagement, and drive inquiries through creative digital execution.


Key Responsibilities
Content Creation & Aesthetic Management:


	Visit the Gbagada studio once a week to film high-quality video (Reels/TikToks) and take photos of new products, the production process, and behind-the-scenes moments.
	Edit all video and photo content using mobile tools (CapCut, Canva, Lightroom, etc.) to maintain a premium, cohesive brand aesthetic.
	Design graphics for promotions, holiday specials, and announcements.


Platform Management & Strategy:


	Manage daily postings and story updates across Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and Twitter/X.
	Develop a monthly content calendar that balances product showcases, educational content, and trending dessert topics.
	Stay ahead of social media trends and platform algorithm changes to keep our brand relevant.


Community Engagement:


	Respond to all comments and direct messages (DMs) with the brand’s unique voice and personality.
	Engage with followers and relevant accounts to build a loyal community around the brand.
	Direct sales inquiries from social media to the appropriate ordering channel.


Performance Tracking:


	Monitor and report on weekly growth, engagement rates, and top-performing content.
	Use data insights to refine the content strategy and improve reach.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Growth in follower count across primary platforms (Instagram/TikTok).
	Average engagement rate per post.
	Volume of inbound inquiries/leads generated via social media.
	Consistency in posting schedule (Stories and Feed).


Requirements


	Experience: 2+ years of experience managing social media for a lifestyle, food, or premium brand.
	Technical Skills: Proficiency in mobile video editing (CapCut/InShot) and graphic design (Canva).
	Equipment: Must have a smartphone with a high-quality camera for content capture.
	Creative Eye: A strong portfolio or page showing an ability to create aesthetically pleasing, high-end food content.
	Self-Discipline: Since this is 80% remote, you must be highly organised and capable of meeting deadlines without physical supervision.


Salary
N100,000 – N130,000 / month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Job Position: HR Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: IT

About the Role


	You will support the HR department in managing recruitment, employee relations, HR administration, onboarding, performance management, and staff engagement activities.


What You&#39;ll Be Doing


	Support recruitment, onboarding, and employee documentation
	Maintain employee records and HR databases
	Assist with attendance, leave, and payroll coordination
	Support employee relations and disciplinary processes
	Coordinate staff engagement and training activities
	Assist with performance management and appraisal processes
	Ensure compliance with company policies and HR procedures
	Prepare HR reports and support daily HR operations.


What We&rsquo;re Looking For


	B.Sc / HND in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related field with&nbsp;4-5 years of HR experience
	Good understanding of HR operations and employee relations
	Strong communication and organizational skills
	Ability to multitask and work in a fast-paced environment
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools
	HR certification is an added advantage.


Why You Should Apply


	Competitive salary and benefits package
	Opportunity to grow within a structured HR team
	Exposure to a fast-paced technology environment
	Career growth and learning opportunities
	Supportive and collaborative work culture.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to:&nbsp;jobs@stretchitconcepts.com&nbsp;using &ldquo;HR Officer - Phase 1&rdquo; as the subject of the email.",

HR Officer Job at Stretch-it Concepts




        
    

        
        Stretch-it Concepts - Our client, a growing IT & Technology company, is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR Officer

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: IT

About the Role


	You will support the HR department in managing recruitment, employee relations, HR administration, onboarding, performance management, and staff engagement activities.


What You'll Be Doing
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Support recruitment, onboarding, and employee documentation
	Maintain employee records and HR databases
	Assist with attendance, leave, and payroll coordination
	Support employee relations and disciplinary processes
	Coordinate staff engagement and training activities
	Assist with performance management and appraisal processes
	Ensure compliance with company policies and HR procedures
	Prepare HR reports and support daily HR operations.


What We’re Looking For


	B.Sc / HND in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related field with 4-5 years of HR experience
	Good understanding of HR operations and employee relations
	Strong communication and organizational skills
	Ability to multitask and work in a fast-paced environment
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools
	HR certification is an added advantage.


Why You Should Apply


	Competitive salary and benefits package
	Opportunity to grow within a structured HR team
	Exposure to a fast-paced technology environment
	Career growth and learning opportunities
	Supportive and collaborative work culture.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] using “HR Officer - Phase 1” as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Outcess Solutions Nigeria Limited is an integrated customer engagement and business process outsourcing company. At Outcess, we believe that digital technologies are driving a paradigm shift in how we live, work and play. This shift makes it possible and imperative for businesses to radically reshape how they interact and transact with customers and partners, seamlessly connecting and enhancing all aspects of their operations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR Executive (Male)

Job Location:&nbsp;Opebi, Ikeja - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The HR Executive is responsible for supporting day-to-day HR operations, including recruitment, employee relations, payroll coordination, compliance, and maintaining HR records.
	The role ensures smooth implementation of HR policies and contributes to building a positive work environment.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send thir CV to:&nbsp;Abdulmumin.Abubakar@outcess.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

HR Executive (Male) Job at Outcess Solutions Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Outcess Solutions Nigeria Limited is an integrated customer engagement and business process outsourcing company. At Outcess, we believe that digital technologies are driving a paradigm shift in how we live, work and play. This shift makes it possible and imperative for businesses to radically reshape how they interact and transact with customers and partners, seamlessly connecting and enhancing all aspects of their operations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR Executive (Male)

Job Location: Opebi, Ikeja - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The HR Executive is responsible for supporting day-to-day HR operations, including recruitment, employee relations, payroll coordination, compliance, and maintaining HR records.
	The role ensures smooth implementation of HR policies and contributes to building a positive work environment.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send thir CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
